content.explanation:
**Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary:**

**FACTORY / PRODUCTION VOCABULARY:**
| Term | Hindi |
|------|-------|
| Raw material | कच्चा माल |
| Finished goods | तैयार माल |
| Assembly | असेंबली |
| Conveyor belt | कन्वेयर बेल्ट |
| Machinery | मशीनरी |
| Shift | पाली |
| Foreman | फोरमैन |
| Output | उत्पादन |
| Defective | दोषपूर्ण |
| Maintenance | रखरखाव |

**SPORTS VOCABULARY:**
| Sport | Key Terms |
|-------|----------|
| Cricket | wicket, over, innings, boundary, LBW, no-ball |
| Football | goal, penalty, offside, referee, striker |
| Badminton | shuttle, net, smash, deuce, set |
| Athletics | sprint, marathon, relay, hurdles, javelin |
| Swimming | stroke, lap, heat, freestyle, butterfly |

**SOUNDS (आवाज़ें):**
Murmur (गुनगुनाहट), Whisper (फुसफुसाहट), Thunder (गड़गड़ाहट), Roar (दहाड़), Chirp (चहचहाना), Splash (छपाका), Creak (चर्र-चर्र), Hiss (सरसराहट — snake)
rules: Sport scores: "3 to 1" / "three-one" / "three goals to one"
Sound verbs: "The door creaked." / "The baby whimpered." / "Thunder roared."
Factory verbs: produce, manufacture, assemble, inspect, maintain, dispatch
Sports verbs: score, win, lose, draw, compete, qualify, eliminate, champion
Onomatopoeia = sound words: buzz, hiss, roar, splash, chirp, crunch
Volume of sound: loud/soft; Pitch: high/low; Quality: harsh/melodious
content.memoryTrick:
**FACTORY = 4 Ps:**
Procure raw material → Produce → Package → Dispatch

**SOUNDS = Imitate them!**
🐍 Hiss | 🦁 Roar | 🐦 Chirp | ⛈️ Thunder
Say the sound word and make the sound — it sticks!

examples.hindi: Factory की night shift में 200 workers काम करते हैं।
examples.english: Two hundred workers work in the night shift at the factory.

examples.hindi: India ने match में 3 wicket लिए।
examples.english: India took 3 wickets in the match.

examples.hindi: Conveyor belt पर defective products आ रहे थे।
examples.english: Defective products were coming on the conveyor belt.

examples.hindi: शेर की दहाड़ दूर से सुनाई दी।
examples.english: The roar of the lion was heard from far away.

examples.hindi: Football match में penalty kick से goal हुआ।
examples.english: A goal was scored from a penalty kick in the football match.

examples.hindi: दरवाज़े ने खुलते समय चर्र-चर्र की आवाज़ की।
examples.english: The door creaked when it opened.

mistakes.correct: The factory has a lot of machinery.

mistakes.why: 'Hissed' already describes the sound — 'noise' is redundant

mistakes.wrong: He scored a boundary in cricket.
mistakes.correct: He hit a boundary in cricket.
mistakes.why: 'Boundary' = hit (not scored); 'scored' is used for runs/goals/points

speakingTips: Factory tour: 'This is the assembly section where all the parts are put together.'
Sports commentary: 'India needed only 5 runs off the last over!'
Sound description: 'The whole stadium roared when the goal was scored.'

vocabulary.example: She became the national swimming champion.
The hall had excellent acoustic resonance.
The engineer inspected the conveyor belt.

practice.hindi: क्रिकेट भारत का सबसे लोकप्रिय खेल है।
practice.english: Cricket is the most popular sport in India.
practice.hint: cricket = क्रिकेट, popular sport = लोकप्रिय खेल

practice.hindi: वह हर रोज़ फुटबॉल खेलता है।
तेज़ आवाज़ कान के लिए हानिकारक है।
practice.english: Loud sound is harmful to the ears.
alternatives: high volume is dangerous for ears.

practice.hindi: इस कारखाने में 500 मजदूर काम करते हैं।
हॉकी भारत का राष्ट्रीय खेल है।
practice.english: Hockey is the national sport of India.

practice.hindi: उसने बैडमिंटन में स्वर्ण पदक जीता।
practice.english: She won the gold medal in badminton.

practice.hindi: यह मशीन बहुत शोर मचाती है।
practice.english: This machine makes a lot of noise.

practice.hindi: इस खेल में बहुत ऊर्जा लगती है।
practice.english: This sport requires a lot of energy.
alternatives: you need lots of stamina for this sport.

practice.hindi: वर्ग की चारों भुजाएँ बराबर होती हैं।
practice.english: All four sides of a square are equal.
alternatives: a square has four equal sides.

practice.hindi: अभ्यास से इंसान परफेक्ट बनता है।
alternatives: the more you practice the better you get.
practice.hint: Practice makes perfect = अभ्यास से परिपूर्णता आती है
